---
name: Story
about: A single buildable slice of an epic with clear scope, acceptance criteria,
  required tests, and required documentation.
title: '[M0][Story] <ID> — <short title>'
labels: Story
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

- <1–2 sentences. What are we delivering?>

## Goal

- <Why this story exists. What capability does it unlock?>

## Scope

- <Bullets of what is included in this story. Keep concrete.>

## Out of scope

- <Bullets of what is explicitly NOT included (even if related).>

## Dependencies / Prereqs

- <Links to other issues or “Requires A2”. If none, write “None”.>

## Decisions locked by this story

- <Small, explicit decisions we are committing to. If none, write “None”.>

## API / Surface (if applicable)

- <Public functions, module names, events. No implementation details.>

## Behavior rules (if applicable)

- <Deterministic rules / invariants.>

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] <Outcome 1>
- [ ] <Outcome 2>
- [ ] <Outcome 3>

## Tests (required)

- [ ] Unit tests cover: <list>
- [ ] Integration tests cover: <list or “N/A”>

## Documentation (required)

- [ ] Add/update docs for: <doc page / section>
- [ ] Include at least one usage example (if applicable)

## Notes

- <Optional. Keep short.>
